question: How long does standard shipping take?
answer: Standard shipping typically takes 5-7 business days. Expedited shipping (2-3 business days) and overnight options are also available at checkout.

question: Do you offer free shipping?
answer: Yes! ShopEasy offers free standard shipping on all orders over $50. Premium and Enterprise plan members enjoy free expedited shipping on every order.

question: Can I track my order?
answer: Absolutely. Once your order ships, you will receive a confirmation email with a tracking number. You can also view live tracking from your ShopEasy account under 'My Orders'.

question: What countries do you ship to?
answer: ShopEasy currently ships to the United States, Canada, United Kingdom, Australia, and most EU countries. International shipping times vary from 7-21 business days depending on destination.

question: What is your return policy?
answer: You may return most items within 30 days of delivery for a full refund, provided the item is unused and in its original packaging. Opened items may be eligible for a partial refund within 14 days. Digital downloads are non-refundable once accessed.

question: How do I start a return?
answer: To initiate a return, log in to your ShopEasy account, navigate to 'My Orders', select the order, and click 'Return Item'. You will receive a prepaid return label via email within 24 hours.

question: How long does a refund take to process?
answer: Once we receive your returned item, refunds are processed within 3-5 business days. The credit will appear on your original payment method within 5-10 business days depending on your bank.

question: Can I exchange an item instead of returning it?
answer: Yes, exchanges are available for items of equal or lesser value within 30 days of delivery. Contact our support team or use the exchange option in your account to get started.

question: How do I reset my password?
answer: Click 'Forgot Password' on the login page and enter your registered email address. You will receive a password reset link within a few minutes. Check your spam folder if it does not arrive.

question: How do I update my billing information?
answer: Go to 'Account Settings' > 'Payment Methods' to add, update, or remove credit cards and other payment methods. Changes take effect immediately for future orders.

question: Can I have multiple shipping addresses saved?
answer: Yes, ShopEasy allows you to save up to 5 shipping addresses in your account. Manage them under 'Account Settings' > 'Addresses'. Premium and Enterprise members can save unlimited addresses.

question: How do I cancel my account?
answer: To cancel your ShopEasy account, go to 'Account Settings' > 'Account Preferences' > 'Close Account'. Please note that cancellation is permanent and all order history will be deleted after 90 days.

question: Are your products covered by a warranty?
answer: Most electronics and appliances sold on ShopEasy come with a minimum 1-year manufacturer warranty. Extended warranty plans are available at checkout. Warranty terms vary by product — see the product page for details.

question: How do I know if a product is authentic?
answer: ShopEasy only partners with authorized sellers and manufacturers. All products are verified for authenticity before listing. Look for the 'ShopEasy Verified' badge on product pages.

question: Can I leave a product review?
answer: Yes! Verified purchasers can leave a review within 90 days of delivery. Go to 'My Orders', select the relevant order, and click 'Write a Review'. Reviews are moderated and posted within 48 hours.
